title: stenogyne campanulata
intro: Stenogyne campanulata, also known as the Hawaiian bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine and has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The medicinal properties of Stenogyne campanulata have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, and it can be prepared in various herbal preparations including teas, infusions, and salves. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
